channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-14 13:40 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk on the biggest danger of AI and robotics: “I think probably the biggest danger of AI or ma...
item.description: Elon Musk on the biggest danger of AI and robotics: “I think probably the biggest danger of AI or maybe the biggest danger of AI and robotics going wrong is government People who are opposed to corporations or worried about corporations should really worry the most about government. Government is just a corporation in the limit; it is the biggest corporation with a monopoly on violence The government could potentially use AI and robotics to suppress the population. That’s a serious concern” Elon says the real threat is Big Government armed with superintelligence

item.title: @elonmusk: The 1st century AD Roman Aqueduct of Segovia, in Spain, constructed from 20,400 granite blocks witho...
item.description: The 1st century AD Roman Aqueduct of Segovia, in Spain, constructed from 20,400 granite blocks without mortar. The bridge structure, which transported water 17 km from mountain springs to Segovia until 1973,

item.title: @elonmusk: Let your kids explore the world of their imagination with Grok Imagine Curiosity is the greatest gif...
item.description: Let your kids explore the world of their imagination with Grok Imagine Curiosity is the greatest gift you can give them - let their imagination run free

item.title: @elonmusk: Grokipedia just got even better. Now when you click the search bar, it displays Trending Articles so...
item.description: Grokipedia just got even better. Now when you click the search bar, it displays Trending Articles so you can jump straight into what people are exploring right now.

item.title: @elonmusk: If Black Mirror Was Written in 1750
item.description: If Black Mirror Was Written in 1750

item.title: @elonmusk: I like to test the styles generated by Grok Imagine.
item.description: I like to test the styles generated by Grok Imagine.

item.title: @elonmusk: Powerwall 3 is coming to Japan this year Sign up to receive updates
item.description: Powerwall 3 is coming to Japan this year Sign up to receive updates

item.title: @elonmusk: Here is a little video I made using the new Grok video feature where you can animate more than one i...
item.description: Here is a little video I made using the new Grok video feature where you can animate more than one image in a video. I also published an article below so you can see how I did it. Very simple! Lots of fun 🙂

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 ranks #2 on 𝜏²-Bench for Telecom Agentic Tool Use on Artificial Analysis with 96.5% accura...
item.description: Grok 4.20 ranks #2 on 𝜏²-Bench for Telecom Agentic Tool Use on Artificial Analysis with 96.5% accuracy, outperforming Claude Opus 4.6 (max), GPT-5.4 (xhigh), and Gemini 3.1 Pro, while closing in on GLM-5 Tool calling is where the whole game is for AI agents, and this is where Grok 4.20 takes over

item.title: @elonmusk: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
item.description: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
